question: What is the approximate average number of website visits for the entire week shown in the chart?

options.A: Unable to determine, because data for all seven days are not available
options.B: About 30 visits, averaging across all seven days shown
options.C: Exactly 40 visits, since the bars appear close to that value
options.D: About 40 visits, using only the days with non-zero bars

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
